text_original: I paid $100.00 for the lifetime subscription so I can have an unlimited chat experience. it's been great until the recent update, because despite having the lifetime subscription now each message uses the gems. and when I run out of gems I can't chat! so what's the point of the lifetime pro subscription??
text_zh: 我花了100.00美元购买了终身订阅，这样我就可以享受无限聊天的体验。在最近的更新之前，一切都很棒，因为尽管我拥有终身订阅，现在每条消息却要消耗宝石。而且当我的宝石用完时，我就不能聊天了！所以终身专业订阅的意义到底是什么？？
reply_original:
I am so sorry for the trouble! Your Lifetime subscription absolutely includes unlimited chats, and you should not be charged gems for messages. This is likely a sync issue from the recent update. 

Please email support@fantachat.ai with your UID and purchase receipt. We will manually fix this and restore your VIP status immediately!
reply_zh:
非常抱歉给您带来麻烦！您的终身订阅绝对包含无限聊天，发送消息不应该扣除宝石。这可能是由于最近更新导致的同步问题。

请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并附上您的 UID 和购买收据。我们会手动修复此问题，并立即恢复您的 VIP 身份！
